name: codex-litellm-bridge
description: Install and manage a LiteLLM-backed Codex model bridge with in-session custom model switching.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex through LiteLLM and expose custom models in /model.
interface.longDescription: Codex LiteLLM Bridge installs a local LiteLLM proxy, writes Codex model-provider configuration, generates a model_catalog.json with custom model entries, and registers a Windows scheduled task so Codex can switch custom models inside a running conversation.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-litellm-bridge to install the Windows LiteLLM bridge.
Use $codex-litellm-bridge to add a custom Codex model.
Use $codex-litellm-bridge to check LiteLLM bridge status.
